name: @getglue/canvas-app
description: Standalone Figma-like infinite canvas for Glue components
author: Tejas Priyadarshi

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer && npm run copy:assets
scripts.copy:assets: cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && mkdir -p dist/renderer/styles && cp src/renderer/styles/*.css dist/renderer/styles/
